message:
Command `# DRT still running at 1h55min, 24% memory (1.96GB), 99.9% CPU. Healthy.
# DRT for 107K nets on sky130A is expected to take 3-8 hours.
# Let's continue monitoring at 30-min intervals.
sleep 1800
ps -p 141328 -o pid,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "DRT ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
wc -c /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/openroad-globalrouting.log 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
